The Ladies' Aid society of the
Vincent Methodist church held Its
regular meeting at 2 O'Clock this

Mrs. j. F. Harris entertained the
members of the Spokane chapter
of the Daughters of the American
Revolution this afternoon at her
apartments in the San Marco. 1t
was the regular business meeting
of the club.

A meeting of the music depart

bly, room of the chamber of com
merce.

George Markle, who has been
